name: Quiche
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Swiss cheese, natural, coarsely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (moderate).
2. Lightly cook dried beef in fat for about 2 minutes. Allow it to cool slightly.
3. Sprinkle the cooked beef into the pastry shell.
4. Sprinkle cheese over the beef.
5. Mix seasonings and sprinkle them over the cheese.
6. Beat eggs and half-and-half together.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese and beef.
8. Bake for 40 minutes or until lightly browned and a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
NOTE: If the beef is very salty, pour 1 cup of boiling water over it. Drain well before cutting coarsely. Calories per serving: About 345. Source: FOOD - by U.S. Department of Agriculture.
